item.title: Who Moved My Cheese?
item.description: What a little book taught me about change, comfort, and moving on when life shifts beneath your feet.

item.title: From Memorization to Divergence: A Systems-Control Perspective on LLM Hallucination
item.description: Hallucinations in LLMs are predictable outcomes of open-loop architecture. This post reframes them through systems and control theory—from memorization and drift to closed-loop correction.

item.title: AI Agents and LLMs: Redefining the Future of Intelligent Systems
item.description: Exploring the role of AI agents and Large Language Models (LLMs) in redefining the future of intelligent systems.

item.title: About
item.description:
I’m Maira Ata. Over the years, I’ve founded, led, and built — always chasing the same goal: turning models, messy data, and cutting-edge research into real products for industries where getting it wrong isn’t an option.

My work sits at the intersection of NLP, information extraction, and LLM engineering — applied to regtech and fintech, where the stakes are rarely abstract.

Before LeoRegtech, I founded Love For Data and led it as CTO. Building from zero taught me one thing above all else: elegant research means nothing if it can’t survive contact with production.
